name: greenlight
description: Greenlight is the governed platform for building and deploying enterprise internal apps. This plugin gives your agent two interchangeable interfaces to Greenlight — an MCP server and the bundled greenlight CLI, which authenticates independently of MCP — plus the skill that teaches the full build-and-deploy workflow. Always read the greenlight skill in full before acting on any Greenlight work, even (especially) when the MCP connection is unavailable: the CLI can do everything MCP can.
